pundit.name: Landon Donovan
pundit.take: **I get why people think soccer might be "The Noisemaker's" next big thing, but let's be honest, Rafe is an accidental tourist in the beautiful game.** Somehow, he leads the pack with a team that includes three squads that didn't even qualify for the World Cup, which says a lot about luck playing favorites when you know nothing about soccer. Meanwhile, poor Gayden, "The Backpass Assassin," drafted with his head high on strategy, yet he's predictably second, chasing a mirage of a first-place finish he probably envisioned over a nice warm-up jog. As Austria, Zach's "Mustard Boy" brainchild, goes toe-to-toe with Jordan, it's hard not to feel for Zach, too. I mean, he's the kind of manager that picks Ghana thinking they're a sure bet in T3 but stumbles down to last place. Look, it could be a close match, but I'm confident Austria will prevail, given Jordan's lackluster performance on the world stage. Predicting a draw in the France vs. Senegal match feels like a safe bet; Gunner's "Bubba G" can enjoy watching both his sides unable to outshine each other. Perhaps one day they’ll reflect on this and realize drafting DR Congo was a questionable call at best.

pundit_takes.headline: Rafe tops WC Challenge standings, proving ignorance is strategic advantage
pundit_takes.subtitle: 'The Noisemaker' leads with a team that didn't even qualify

pundit_takes.headline: Mustard Boy's Austrian squad set to face Jordan in battle of drafts
pundit_takes.subtitle: Zach was heard asking if Austria is the capital of Australia

pundit_takes.headline: Bubba G to face himself as France takes on Senegal
pundit_takes.subtitle: Wonder if Gunner gets two remotes to watch this one

pundit_takes.headline: Ghost Pepper's Norway poised to tackle undrafted Iraq in Foxborough
pundit_takes.subtitle: Devin's burning ambition now relies on Scandinavian cool

rome_analytics_quotes: Gunner, once the favorite, is now watching a teen take the top spot.
Rafe's draft picks are more comedy show than World Cup roster.
Rafe vs. Devin: 6-0. Hey Devin, how's it feel losing to a rookie?
The sim's crystal ball needs cleaning; Rafe still stuns everyone at 15.
